# WalletLens API

> Paid x402 API for normalized EVM wallet portfolio snapshots and enriched transaction history.

WalletLens provides machine-readable wallet data endpoints for agents and automation. It returns normalized token balances, native balances, prices where available, and TxLens enriched transaction history across supported EVM chains. Paid endpoints use x402 over HTTP 402 Payment Required.

## Key URLs

- [Health](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/health): Service health check.
- [Status](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/status): Machine-readable status, resources, pricing, and docs links.
- [Preview](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/preview): Free cached live demo wallet response and portfolio shape.
- [Examples](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/examples): Copy-paste calls for agents and humans.
- [Pricing](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/pricing): Price, network, and payment details.
- [x402 discovery](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/.well-known/x402.json): Paid resource metadata.
- [OpenAPI](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/openapi.json): Machine-readable API schema.
- [Full LLM docs](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/llms-full.txt): Complete agent usage guide.
- [WalletLens agent skill](https://walletlens.wallyweb.com/docs/walletlens-agent-skill.md): Shareable instructions for agent clients.

## Paid Endpoints

- `GET /portfolio`
- `GET /tx-history`
- Price: `$0.02` USDC per request
- Payment network: Base mainnet, `eip155:8453`
- Payment protocol: x402
- Query params:
  - `address`: required EVM wallet address
  - `chains`: optional comma-separated chain list

## Supported Chains

- `base`
- `ethereum` or `eth`
- `optimism`
- `arbitrum`
- `polygon`

## Notes For Agents

Start with `/.well-known/x402.json` and `/openapi.json`. For unpaid requests to `/portfolio` or `/tx-history`, expect HTTP `402` with a `payment-required` response header. Use an x402-capable client to satisfy the payment requirement, then retry the same request with the payment header.
